definitions.text: A perennial woody plant taller and larger than a shrub with a wooden trunk and, at some distance from the ground, having leaves and branches.
examples: Hyperion is the tallest living tree in the world.
Birds have a nest in a tree in the garden.

definitions.text: Any other plant (such as a large shrub or herb) that is reminiscent of the above in form and size.
examples: The banana tree is a tall perennial herb: its trunk is not woody.

definitions.text: To chase (an animal or person) up a tree.

examples: Black bears can tree their cubs for protection, but grizzly bears cannot.

definitions.text: To place upon a shoe tree; to fit with a shoe tree; to stretch upon a shoe tree.
